**Alternatives considered**

**Scope reminder**

Relay is intentionally a thin shared notebook between Claude on iOS and Claude Code on the desktop. Features that turn it into a notes app, a search engine, or a sync engine are out of scope. Features that improve the bidirectional path or self-hosting safety are in scope.
